Bombay Indian Restaurant Phu Quoc is sitting at 07 Lê Lợi, Khu 1 and people keep coming back. Butter chicken, fresh naan, proper spice levels. Not watered down for tourists.

If you've been craving something different mid-trip, this is the answer.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.

Peace Corner sits on Đường Dinh Bà, away from the main drag, which is exactly why the people who find it keep rating it that high.

Ông Lang is the low-key side of Phu Quoc. If you're staying there or passing through, this spot belongs on your list.

Go early. Locals fill this place fast.

Book before your schedule fills up. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.

items.placeName: Eco Tour Thai Duong – Cua Can River Basket Boat Experience

facebook.caption:
POV: you're spinning in a basket boat on the Cửa Cạn River and you cannot stop laughing.

Eco Tour Thái Dương gets you off the resort strip and onto the water in a way most tourists never find. Basket boats, river mangroves, the whole thing.

4.3★ across 98 reviews. Small group. Real Phu Quoc.

facebook.caption: Tourists walk right past this. Cầu Ánh Sáng sits inside Grand World and most visitors never slow down long enough to notice it. Lit up at night, reflections on the water, almost no crowd if you time it right. Go after 8pm on a weekday. Completely different energy from the main strip. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: The lights hit the water and everyone else is still at the market. Cầu Ánh Sáng at night, Grand World, Phu Quoc. Go on a weekday. Thank us later.
